source.title: iTunes Search API - Multi-App Multi-Country Comparison (March 2026)

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo iOS China rating: 2.9/5 (3.38M ratings) — lowest among major Chinese e-commerce apps
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo CN: 2.93/5 (3,380,562 ratings). Taobao CN: 4.14/5 (1,679,186 ratings). Pinduoduo is rated 1.2 stars lower than Taobao in the China App Store.

verification.verifier_notes: iTunes Lookup API for bundle IDs com.xunmeng.pinduoduo and com.taobao.taobao4iphone, country=cn. Run via scrape-appstore.py and qimai-appdata.py scripts.

extractions.claim: Temu iOS US rating: 4.67/5 (2.06M ratings) — second only to Amazon
extractions.evidence: Temu US: 4.67/5 (2,064,730 ratings). Amazon US: 4.83/5 (8,344,524 ratings). Taobao US: 3.66/5 (9,556 ratings). Pinduoduo US: 2.37/5 (7,004 ratings).

verification.verifier_notes: iTunes Lookup API, country=us. Run via scrape-appstore.py.

extractions.claim: Temu maintains 4.2-4.7 ratings across all major international markets
extractions.evidence: Temu ratings by market: US 4.67/5, UK 4.71/5, DE 4.67/5, JP 4.25/5, BR 4.39/5. Consistently high across all markets.

verification.verifier_notes: iTunes Lookup API, multiple countries. Run via scrape-appstore.py.

extractions.claim: Stark divergence between App Store (4.7) and Trustpilot (2.0) ratings for Temu
extractions.evidence: Temu US App Store: 4.67/5 (prompted, in-app). Temu Trustpilot: 2.0/5 (self-selected, complaint-driven). This 2.67-point gap is the largest among shopping apps and suggests heavy app store rating manipulation via prompts or the 10.9% AI review rate on Trustpilot inflating the gap.

verification.verifier_notes: App Store ratings are prompted after positive experiences. Trustpilot reviews are self-selected and skew negative. Both biases contribute to the gap.

extractions.claim: Domestic peer comparison: Pinduoduo (2.9) vs Taobao (4.1) — Pinduoduo is the clear laggard in China iOS ratings
extractions.evidence: China App Store: Taobao 4.14/5 (1.68M ratings) vs Pinduoduo 2.93/5 (3.38M ratings). Despite having 2x more ratings (suggesting broader usage), Pinduoduo's rating is 1.21 points lower. JD.com bundle ID returned no results.

verification.verifier_notes: JD.com may use a different bundle ID than com.jd.jdmobile. Taobao comparison is definitive.
